short_summary: Iran deal progress, gang leader killed
rationale: Iran deal diplomatic momentum continues with direct US involvement; Trump claims killing of Venezuelan gang leader signals active domestic security action.

top_events.title: Trump seeks 'off-ramp' from Iran; Hormuz deal reaffirmed
top_events.summary: Active US diplomacy on Iran continues with Iran reaffirming Hormuz reopening tied to a deal. If successful, this would lower US gas prices and reduce Middle East military exposure.

top_events.title: Trump claims US strike killed Tren de Aragua gang boss
top_events.summary: US forces reportedly killed the leader of the Venezuelan Tren de Aragua gang, a domestic security win claimed by Trump. Relevant to US residents concerned about gang violence and immigration.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic for espionage
top_events.summary: China detained a US academic at a conference on espionage charges, escalating US-China tensions and raising concerns for Americans traveling or working in China.
